    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.equality with parameters of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <V> boolean
    EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object o, Property<T> property, V... v)
    Checks whether this object is equal to o modulo the property described by property.
    int
    EqualsModProperty.hashCodeModProperty(Property<T> property)
    Computes the hash code according to the given ignored property.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends EqualsModProperty<T>>
    int
    EqualityUtils.hashCodeModPropertyOfIterable(Property<T> property, Iterable<? extends T> iter)
    Computes the hashcode modulo a given property of an iterable of elements that implement EqualsModProperty.

    Description

    Constructs a new empty LinkedHashMapWrapper.
